creator: welenofsky@gmail.com
text:
When attempting to install xfm from x11/fxm, a dependency, fox-1.6.47.tar.gz was needed. The file seems unavailble on the master sites reported on FreshPorts.

"ftp://ftp.fox-toolkit.org/pub/
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/"

ftp.fox-toolkit.org/pub/ was unreachable and ftp.freebsd.org/pub/.../distfiles/ did not have a copy of fox-1.6.47 only fox-1.6.46

Fix: 

Download fox-1.6.47.tar.gz manually and place in /usr/ports/distfiles/
How-To-Repeat: portmaster x11/xfm
